gates: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const task=fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8'); for (const needle of ['## Required implementation','## Required tests','## Acceptance criteria']) { if(!task.includes(needle)) throw new Error('task missing section: '+needle); }" {{taskFile}}

$p='client/src/lib/skills/datamodel/dataModelSkill.ts'; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/datamodel/dataModelSkill.ts' -Pattern 'buildFieldLineageIndex' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing buildFieldLineageIndex in client/src/lib/skills/datamodel/dataModelSkill.ts' }; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/datamodel/dataModelSkill.ts' -Pattern 'traceFieldLineage' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing traceFieldLineage in client/src/lib/skills/datamodel/dataModelSkill.ts' }; if(-not (Select-String -LiteralPath 'client/src/lib/skills/datamodel/dataModelSkill.ts' -Pattern 'DM_LINEAGE_FIELD_MISSING' -SimpleMatch -Quiet)){ throw 'missing DM_LINEAGE_FIELD_MISSING in client/src/lib/skills/datamodel/dataModelSkill.ts' }
